content.text: Let me verify all 13 files were created successfully.

All 13 shared component files have been successfully created at `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\`. Here is the complete list:

| # | File | Description |
|---|------|-------------|
| 1 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\GoldCard.tsx` | Reusable card wrapper with gold border/hover effects |
| 2 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\GoldButton.tsx` | Button component with primary/secondary/ghost variants, loading state, and gold gradient styling |
| 3 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\ShimmerEffect.tsx` | Decorative shimmer/reflection animation overlay |
| 4 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\ToastSystem.tsx` | Toast notification system with context provider, `useToast` hook, and `ToastContainer` renderer (success/error/info types) |
| 5 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\ScoreRing.tsx` | Animated SVG circular score ring with gold color thresholds for AEO scores |
| 6 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\StripeCheckout.tsx` | Stripe-styled checkout form with gold theme, supporting subscription and one-time payment modes |
| 7 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\Navbar.tsx` | Top navigation bar with logo, credits display, notifications dropdown, profile dropdown, language selector, and mobile hamburger toggle |
| 8 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\Sidebar.tsx` | Desktop collapsible sidebar and mobile drawer with 9 navigation items across 3 sections (Principal, Marketplace, Mon Compte) |
| 9 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\MobileBottomNav.tsx` | Mobile bottom tab bar with 4 items (Dashboard, Market, Audit, Account) |
| 10 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\AppFooter.tsx` | Application footer with 4-column layout (brand, product, AEO resources, company) |
| 11 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\OnboardingModal.tsx` | 3-step onboarding modal with portal rendering, progress dots, and skip functionality |
| 12 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\CommandPalette.tsx` | Command palette search panel with 8 navigation commands and filtering |
| 13 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-public\components\ShortcutsModal.tsx` | Keyboard shortcuts modal with portal rendering showing Ctrl+K, ?, and Esc shortcuts |

All components use the gold color theme (`gold-400`, `gold-500`, `gold-600`), dark surface backgrounds (`surface-100`, `#0a0a0a`), and import from `lucide-react` for icons. The Navbar, Sidebar, MobileBottomNav, and AppFooter components import from `../i18n` for translations and `../types` for the `User` type.
